column1: # OWASP ZAP baseline scan rule tuning.
# SECURITY DECISION: nothing is IGNOREd by default - every rule ZAP ships
# with runs at its default action. This file exists as the documented,
# version-controlled place to add exceptions (e.g. a rule that only ever
# fires on a third-party asset you don't control), so any future
# suppression is visible in code review rather than silently disabling
# a check in the pipeline itself.
# Example of how a tuned exception would be added (left commented out
# intentionally - nothing is suppressed in this project):

column3: .*/static/.*   # X-Content-Type-Options missing on static assets only
